Resolves #14316

Rewrites `learn/benefits/AgentOSOnYourCodebase.md` into a concrete, source-grounded guide for adopting the Agent OS around a codebase the models were not trained on. The new version explains Knowledge Base, Memory Core, cross-family review, local/cloud deployment, local/remote model routing, self-healing, and the Neural Link boundary without presenting Neural Link as a prerequisite for arbitrary repository learning.

Evidence: L2 (source-grounded guide rewrite + docs lint + browser-backed Mermaid render) -> L2 required for a documentation close target. Residual: none.

Related: #14310

## Deltas from ticket

The rewrite keeps the scope to one guide file. `learn/tree.json` and generated portal SEO artifacts were already current, so this PR does not churn generated files.

The guide explicitly separates repository learning from live runtime possession:

- repository learning: Knowledge Base, Memory Core, Native Edge Graph, tenant ingestion, and review process;
- live Neo UI possession: Neural Link;
- arbitrary runtime possession: future extension, not a current claim.

## Test Evidence

- `npm run ai:lint-guides` — passed; 0 hard failures. The command still reports unrelated existing warnings elsewhere in the docs set.
- `npm run ai:lint-tree-json` — passed; 212 nodes.
- `npm run agent-preflight -- learn/benefits/AgentOSOnYourCodebase.md --pr-body <draft-body>` — passed; PR body template anchors present.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- Drift sweep against the rewritten guide for client names and disallowed framing terms — passed with no matches.
- Browser-backed Mermaid validation using the installed Mermaid bundle in headless Google Chrome — passed; the extracted TD diagram parsed and rendered to a nontrivial SVG.
- Knowledge Base grounding queries covered Agent OS proof surfaces and whether arbitrary-codebase learning requires Neural Link.
- Memory Core grounding found no strong prior plan for this exact guide rewrite, but did surface older Neural Link context that informed the boundary section.

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] Portal docs page renders the rewritten guide and Mermaid diagram after deployment.
